title: capsella oelandica
intro: Capsella oelandica, also known as Oeland's shepherd's purse, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its distinctive heart-shaped seed pods and hairy leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe irritated tissues. The health benefits of Capsella oelandica include its ability to reduce coughs and colds, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Capsella oelandica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
